mapper.select: SELECT id, tag_name, tag_code, sort_order, use_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag FROM osh_website_tag WHERE tag_name = #{tagName} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_website_tag (tag_name, tag_code, sort_order, use_count, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{tagName}, #{tagCode}, #{sortOrder}, #{useCount}, #{deleteFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_website_tag SET use_count = use_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE osh_website_tag SET use_count = GREATEST(use_count - 1, 0), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, tag_name AS tagName, use_count AS useCount, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM osh_website_tag WHERE delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY use_count DESC, sort_order DESC

SELECT id, tag_name AS tagName, use_count AS useCount FROM osh_website_tag WHERE delete_flag = 0
AND tag_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY use_count DESC, sort_order DESC LIMIT 20
